title: chrysoma domingensis
intro: Chrysoma domingensis, also known as the Dominguez's daisy or Dominguez's yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Chrysoma domingensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Chrysoma domingensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
